# ankerl::unordered_dense

## About
This is a single header copy of ankerl::unordered_dense, a fast and memory efficient hash map/set implementation.

## Origin
- **Repository**: https://github.com/martinus/unordered_dense
- **Version**: v4.5.0
- **License**: MIT

## Usage
This library is used in the Mobile 3D Gaussian Splatting project as a high-performance alternative to std::unordered_map when MSPLAT_USE_SYSTEM_STL is not defined.

## Updates
To update this library:
1. Download the latest single header release from the GitHub repository
2. Replace `unordered_dense.h` with the new version
3. Update the version number in this README
